message:
🧹 Replace duplicate relativeTime functions with shared formatTimeAgo (#10339)

- Replace local relativeTime() in RecentFailures.tsx and ClusterGroups.tsx
  with the shared formatTimeAgo() from lib/formatters.ts
- Replace magic numbers in RecentFailures.tsx formatDuration() with
  named constants (MS_PER_SECOND, SECONDS_PER_MINUTE, MS_PER_HOUR)
- Replace local SECS_PER_MINUTE/HOUR/DAY in valueResolvers.ts with
  imports from lib/constants/time.ts

Fixes #10337

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
